problem id: 094de91f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  11100111 -> 01000001
  11001011 -> 11011001
  01000010 -> 01011011
  10111001 -> 00011101
  01110000 -> 00011111
  11011011 -> 11111001
  01010001 -> 01001101
  11100110 -> 01010011
  01100101 -> 01100101

query: 11101011
predicted answer: 10011001
